CustomField.formula: IF(OR(Contains(Text(Industry),'Asset'), Contains(Text(Industry),'Banking'), Contains(Text(Industry),'Wealth'), Contains(Text(Industry),'Finance'), Contains(Text(Industry),'Insurance - P&C'), Contains(Text(Industry),'Insurance - Life')), 'Financial Services', IF(OR(Contains(TEXT(Industry),'Medical'), Contains(Text(Industry),'Health')), 'Healthcare', IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Manufacturing - CPG'), ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Distribution/Distributors'), ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Energy and Utilities')), 'Industrial', IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Logistics & Transportation'), ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Business Services'), ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Media and Advertising')), 'Services', IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Technology'), ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Telecommunications')), 'Technology', IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Govt / Non-profit'), ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Education'), ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Retail'), ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Other - Misc'), ISPICKVAL(Industry, 'Hospitality')), 'Other', ''))))))
CustomField.label: Primary Industry
